name: Telcoin TEL v3 Cross-Chain Token
description: Designing and deploying the next generation of TEL — Telcoin's governance token with a 300M+ market cap. The v3 upgrade migrates the token to a fully cross-chain architecture powered by LayerZero v2, enabling seamless interoperability across chains.

name: Telcoin Digital Asset BankC eUSD Stablecoin
description: Built, tested, and deployed eUSD — the official stablecoin of Telcoin Digital Asset Bank, the first registered crypto bank in the US. Designed to compete with USDC, eUSD is a fully on-chain dollar-pegged asset backed by Telcoin's regulated banking infrastructure.

name: Peg Stability Vault (EVM)
description: Solidity smart contract enabling 1:1 exchanges between a stablecoin and its backing asset. Deployed for eUSD <> USDC to provide on-chain arbitrage and help maintain the peg across liquidity pools.

name: Peg Stability Vault (Solana)
description: Solana implementation of the peg stability vault — offering the same 1:1 stable swap mechanics for maintaining stablecoin peg integrity, built natively for the Solana runtime.

name: Mainstreet (msUSD)
description: An EthenaFi competitor built on Ethereum. msUSD is a yield-bearing stablecoin that generates returns for holders through on-chain delta-neutral strategies and protocol-owned liquidity.

name: Frey AI Agent
description: An autonomous AI agent built on the Eliza framework — capable of operating independently across social and on-chain environments.

name: Baskets
description: A tokenized REIT protocol bringing real estate investment on-chain — allowing users to gain fractional exposure to real-world property assets through ERC-20 basket tokens.

name: RWA Governance (re.al chain)
description: Built, tested, and deployed the RWA governance token for re.al chain using Curve's battle-tested vote-escrow (veToken) library. Provided on-chain governance and voting weight for the protocol's real-world asset ecosystem.

name: Arcana
description: An early EthenaFi competitor deployed on re.al chain, offering a yield-bearing stablecoin through delta-neutral positioning. Superseded by Mainstreet following the deprecation of re.al chain.

name: Komodo Labs Site
description: This portfolio site — built with Astro, vanilla CSS, and zero frameworks. Fast, static, and fully custom.
